title: Lafto Movers Checklist: Everything You Need to Know
excerpt: Full Lafto checklist from twelve weeks through destination unload: gates, utilities, IDs, packing phases, Lafto-specific access, paperwork, contingencies.
content:
Lafto: everything you need to know—checklist edition

Lafto sub-city and nearby blocks span residential growth, commercial strips, and compounds with strict gate rules. This checklist merges admin, packing, access, and day-of execution so nothing critical slips.

Twelve weeks before

  • Research movers; read reviews with specifics.
  • Declutter aggressively; sell or donate early.
  • Photograph rental walls for deposit baseline.

Eight weeks before

  • Request three identical-scope estimates in writing.
  • Book mover; hold alternate date if possible.
  • Order boxes, tape, bubble wrap, dish packs.

Six weeks before

  • Submit crew ID lists to compounds that require them.
  • Confirm elevator and loading bay reservations.
  • Notify landlord; clarify deposit return steps.

Four weeks before

  • Schedule utilities at destination; note meter readings at origin.
  • Medical refills for two extra weeks.
  • School transcripts if changing institutions.
  • Back up computers; secure password manager export.

Two weeks before

  • Pack non-daily rooms; label destination and fragile on two sides.
  • Reconfirm crew count, truck size, start time.
  • Plan meals to empty freezer.
  • Arrange childcare or pet care for loading hours.

One week before

  • Suitcase per person with one week of clothes.
  • Open First box: tools, chargers, toilet paper, wipes, meds.
  • Confirm parking passes spell names like official IDs.
  • Withdraw small cash if using tips.

48 hours before

  • Reconfirm ETA and supervisor phone.
  • Strip beds; keep one linen set accessible.
  • Charge devices; power strips in personal bags.
  • Water plants you will transport; tape soil lines.

Night before

  • Defrost fridge if moving; wipe dry per manual.
  • Disconnect washer; secure drum if required.
  • Sleep early; buffer alarms.

Moving day morning

  • Fragile walkthrough once with crew lead.
  • Door monitor while doors stay open.
  • Valuables off the truck.
  • Final closet and balcony sweep.

Lafto-specific notes

Confirm truck height at gates; soft shoulders and construction debris affect staging. Mid-week scouting beats guessing weekend traffic. Dust from nearby sites—close unused windows during load.

At destination

  • Verify labels before unload order.
  • Photo damaged cartons before opening.
  • Assemble beds early if kids need sleep.
  • Test appliances when power is live.

Paperwork bundle

PDF folder: estimates, amendments, payments, completion notes. Employers and landlords ask randomly.

If plans break

Pause, photograph, call supervisor. Annotate paperwork with noted exceptions rather than refusing signatures without context.

Merging two households

Unify box numbering before movers arrive—duplicate numbers cause wrong-room drops.

Bikes, instruments, sports gear

Loosen instrument strings for temperature shifts; pad bike frames; bag helmets with shoes.

Truck height at gates

Confirm clearance with security; stuck trucks cost more than shuttle plans.

Conclusion

Lafto movers need clients who treat relocation like a project. Work this checklist top to bottom, share it with household members, and hand a copy to your crew lead.
author: Active Movers Team
